description: CUFinder is an all-in-one B2B sales intelligence and enrichment platform with verified leads and company data.
overview: CUFinder helps sales, marketing, and recruiting teams find verified leads and enrich company data, with a large database and integrations across 10+ CRMs.
what_is: CUFinder is an all-in-one B2B lead generation and data enrichment platform. It helps sales teams, marketers, and recruiters find accurate leads and company data, drawing on a large database of social profiles, phone numbers, and individual records.

It is strongest for contact search, company enrichment, and keeping CRM data current, with leads available soon after signup. CUFinder integrates with more than 10 CRMs and automation tools, focusing on clean, actionable data rather than direct campaign management.
